basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has released the official Executive (Project Associate-I or II) Notification 2026 on 15 June 2026 at iitmandi.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Mandi Executive Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and a qualification of B.Tech., M.Tech., or M.Sc. can apply through Email on or before 22 July 2026. The recruitment is being conducted on a contractual basis. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: May be relaxed for deserving applicants or as per institute/GoI norms.

qualification.details: For Project Associate-II (SRF): M.Tech. in Materials Science/Electronics/Microelectronics/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science/Polymer technology/Manufacturing Science/Manufacturing Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology or equivalent; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project. Or Master in Science in Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics or equivalent management/computer science; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project (Minimum 2 years of experience). For Project Associate-I (JRF): B.tech in Materials Science/Electronics/Microelectronics/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science/Polymer technology/Manufacturing Science/Manufacturing Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology or equivalent; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project. Or Master in Science in Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics or equivalent management/computer science; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Executive Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Mandi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Mandi Executive (Project Associate-I or II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Executive Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: For Project Associate-II (SRF): M.Tech. in Materials Science/Electronics/Microelectronics/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science/Polymer technology/Manufacturing Science/Manufacturing Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology or equivalent; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project. Or Master in Science in Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics or equivalent management/computer science; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project (Minimum 2 years of experience). For Project Associate-I (JRF): B.tech in Materials Science/Electronics/Microelectronics/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science/Polymer technology/Manufacturing Science/Manufacturing Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology or equivalent; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project. Or Master in Science in Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics or equivalent management/computer science; subject to the relevant domain expertise as per the requirements of the project.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Executive Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: May be relaxed for deserving applicants or as per institute/GoI norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Executive post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Executive (Project Associate-I or II) position in this recruitment drive by IIT Mandi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have M.Tech., M.Sc., or B.Tech. in specific fields like Materials Science, Electronics, Microelectronics, Polymer Science, etc., as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years. Age relaxation may be provided for deserving candidates as per institute or government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIT Mandi Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Mandi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and application links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
